race.description: Tabtouch Watch Sky Racing Parliamentarians Cup
race.comment: ROCKANDROLLARTIST (1) has had a series of wider or second row draws since he led to win at this venue last month. Poses enough gate speed to take advantage of the ace draw so should get every chance. OTIS (11) had a similar draw to this last start and did a good job for fifth in the G3 Governors Cup. That was his fourth successive time chasing Magnificent Storm including a third in the Pinjarra Cup. Winning chance if he gets the gaps from the second line. The same could be said for MENEMSHA (10) who draws for a trail and will be fitter for a solid fresh effort when he drew wider on this row. ALTA TRIBUTE (2) had a tough barrier and raced three wide without cover last start but is much better served by this draw. Placed when fresh two back and has won two of three fresh attempts.
